Title: Guided claim/create/summary flows
Status: Not Started
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-25
Ticket: CMP-CHAT-811
Epic: CMP-E8: Chatbot Parity and Guided Workflows
---

As a user
I want guided chatbot flows for claim, draft creation, and status summary so I can complete tasks without manual navigation.
So chatbot becomes a first-class execution path.

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Claim flow filters to unclaimed content only and enforces self-claim.
- [ ] Create flow collects minimum required draft fields.
- [ ] Summary flow asks campaign/date disambiguation when needed.
- [ ] Flow writes call same backend contracts as UI.
- [ ] Responses include deep-links to module screens.
